name: kuberocketci-plugins
description: AI agents for KubeRocketCI platform - Software Development Lifecycle automation

metadata.description: AI agents for KubeRocketCI platform - SDLC automation

plugins.name: krci-help
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI ecosystem guide - dry, caveman-style map of all KRCI plugins, agents, and skills plus the SDLC AI framework (which agent runs which pipeline stage); also provisions the multi-repo source workspace

plugins.name: krci-godev
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Go Developer agent - Expert Go and Kubernetes operator development assistance

plugins.name: krci-general
plugins.description: General-purpose KubeRocketCI development utilities including commit message generation and code review

plugins.name: krci-fullstack
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Fullstack Developer agent - Expert React, TypeScript, Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, and tRPC development assistance for portal applications

plugins.name: krci-devops
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI DevOps agent - Expert automation for EDP-Tekton repository (github.com/epam/edp-tekton) pipeline and task onboarding

plugins.name: krci-architect
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Architect agent - Technical architecture planning, design validation, and cross-component coordination for the KRCI ecosystem

plugins.name: krci-docs
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Technical Writer agent - documentation and presentation review applying the Microsoft Writing Style Guide and project documentation standards

plugins.name: krci-ba
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Business Analyst agent - requirements gathering, process analysis, business rules, and user journey mapping with BR/NFR traceability

plugins.name: krci-product
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI Product team agents - Product Manager, Product Owner, Product Marketing Manager, and Project Manager for the full product lifecycle

plugins.name: krci-qa
plugins.description: KubeRocketCI QA agents - manual and automation quality assurance: test planning, test cases, execution, defect reporting, and Gherkin test automation
